item.name: Harlequin Lancer
item.description:
One of several species kept in the Cleyra Museum of Nature for the sake of future generations, this colorful wavekin is highly poisonous.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The black and yellow splotches that cover this wavekin's body bring to mind the gaudy costumes of clowns and jesters. Yet far from serving to entertain, these vibrant colors warn predators that the lancer's flesh is filled with deadly toxins.
